## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Harness prompt or contract
- [ ] Workflow or hook behavior
- [ ] Generated game code
- [ ] Asset generation or provenance

## Verification

List commands, QA evidence, or manual checks performed.

## Compatibility

- [ ] I did not change `/forge`, `forge-*`, stage values, state schemas, or
      generated artifact paths.
- [ ] If I changed a contract, I updated `.claude/docs/contract.md` first and
      documented the migration.

## Security and License

- [ ] No secrets, provider keys, or private generated output are included.
- [ ] Generated assets include provenance and license metadata when applicable.
- [ ] Security-sensitive details are not disclosed in this PR.
